creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
pyenv fetches and builds Python directly from upstream outside of the ports framework, and as such does not inherit the appropriate environment for automatic setting of appropriate build time variables to identify third party dependencies.

Upstream (pyenv) provides documentation on how to customise the build process:

 - https://github.com/pyenv/pyenv/wiki/Common-build-problems
 - https://github.com/pyenv/pyenv/blob/master/plugins/python-build/README.md

It would be great to add FreeBSD specific customization instructions to these upstream docc

^Triage: Expected behaviour and not a ports issue (bug)
